name: [BUG-005] Cards do not support priority field
description:
Expected: Cards accept priority (low/medium/high) and return it in response.
        Actual:   priority field is ignored — all cards treated equally.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: Cards accept priority (low/medium/high) and return it in response.
    Actual:   priority field is ignored — all cards treated equally.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-005: Card has no priority field

AssertionError: Priority field not supported — no way to distinguish urgent from normal tasks
assert ('priority' in {'board_id': 3, 'column': 'Backlog', 'created_at': '2026-05-18T08:54:30.443953', 'creator_id': 2, ...})

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-005: Card has no priority field')

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-005: Card has no priority field')
